/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/core/Application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/core/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/ecs/Scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/editor/EditorLayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/editor/ImGuiLayer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/render/Renderer2D.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/vk/Pipeline.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/vk/Swapchain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/vk/Texture.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanEngine.dir/src/vk/VulkanContext.cpp.o -o VulkanEngine  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libvulkan.so libimgui.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libvulkan.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3
